chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-5226 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No.23131/2024. 3. For hearing of Main Case. 23.12.2024 Mr. Zohaib Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. It is jointly submitted that the Petition may be disposed of in view of the application available at Page 31 herein shall be decided by the department expeditiously, preferably, within three weeks, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending such determination, no further coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE M.Khan
